# @alternative-design-and-media/rentman-api-connector

Type-safe Rentman REST API connector for Node.js and edge runtimes (Cloudflare Workers), synced to OAS v1.7.0.

## When to use

Use this package when you need typed access to Rentman REST resources with:
- endpoint constants (`ENDPOINTS`)
- typed responses (`RentmanCollectionResponse<T>`, `RentmanItemResponse<T>`)
- query helpers for fields/sort/filters
- auto-pagination (`listAll`)

## Runtime support

- Node.js 18+
- Edge runtimes with native `fetch` (e.g. Cloudflare Workers)

## Install

```bash
npm install @alternative-design-and-media/rentman-api-connector
```

## Core exports

- `createRentmanClient(options)`
- `RentmanClient`
- `RentmanApiError`
- `ENDPOINTS`
- query helpers: `buildRentmanQuery`, `rel`, `notNull`, `isNull`
- resource types from `src/types.ts` (e.g. `RentmanEquipmentItem`, `RentmanProject`, `RentmanContact`)

## `createRentmanClient()`

```ts
import { createRentmanClient } from '@alternative-design-and-media/rentman-api-connector';

const rentman = createRentmanClient({
  token: process.env.RENTMAN_TOKEN!,
  // optional: baseUrl, fetch
});
```

`token` supports either:
- a static string JWT
- a function `() => string | Promise<string>` for token rotation

## Client methods

- `list<T>(path, query?)` → `Promise<RentmanCollectionResponse<T>>`
- `listAll<T>(path, query?, pageSize = 300)` → `Promise<T[]>` (auto-paginates)
- `get<T>(path, id, query?)` → `Promise<RentmanItemResponse<T>>`
- `create<TIn, TOut>(path, body)` → `Promise<RentmanItemResponse<TOut>>`
- `update<TIn, TOut>(path, id, body)` → `Promise<RentmanItemResponse<TOut>>`
- `delete(path, id)` → `Promise<void>`

All methods throw `RentmanApiError` for non-2xx API responses.

## Query helpers

```ts
import { buildRentmanQuery, rel, notNull, isNull } from '@alternative-design-and-media/rentman-api-connector';

const params = buildRentmanQuery({
  fields: ['id', 'name'],
  sort: ['+name'],
  filters: { country: 'gb' },
  relFilters: [rel('distance', 'lte', 300)],
  nullFilters: [notNull('folder'), isNull('archive')],
  limit: 50,
  offset: 0,
});
```

- `rel(field, op, value)` supports `lt | lte | gt | gte | neq`
- `notNull(field)` serializes to `field[isnull]=false`
- `isNull(field)` serializes to `field[isnull]=true`

## Custom field typing pattern

Default type is open (`custom_<number>` keys). For account-specific autocomplete, narrow with `TCustom`:

```ts
import { type RentmanEquipmentItem } from '@alternative-design-and-media/rentman-api-connector';

interface EquipmentCustom {
  custom_16?: string;
  custom_88?: number;
}

type MyEquipment = RentmanEquipmentItem<EquipmentCustom>;
```

## Error handling

```ts
import { RentmanApiError } from '@alternative-design-and-media/rentman-api-connector';

try {
  await rentman.list(ENDPOINTS.equipment, { limit: 50 });
} catch (err) {
  if (err instanceof RentmanApiError) {
    console.error(err.status, err.body);
  }
}
```

## Endpoint overview (`ENDPOINTS` key -> path -> type)

- `equipment` -> `/equipment` -> `RentmanEquipmentItem`
- `equipmentSetsContent` -> `/equipmentsetscontent` -> `RentmanEquipmentSetContent`
- `accessories` -> `/accessories` -> `RentmanAccessory`
- `stockMovements` -> `/stockmovements` -> `RentmanStockMovement`
- `stockLocations` -> `/stocklocations` -> `RentmanStockLocation`
- `serialNumbers` -> `/serialnumbers` -> `RentmanSerialNumber`
- `repairs` -> `/repairs` -> `RentmanRepair`
- `contacts` -> `/contacts` -> `RentmanContact`
- `contactPersons` -> `/contactpersons` -> `RentmanContactPerson`
- `crew` -> `/crew` -> `RentmanCrewMember`
- `crewAvailabilities` -> `/crewavailabilities` -> `RentmanCrewAvailability`
- `crewRates` -> `/crewrates` -> `RentmanCrewRate`
- `projects` -> `/projects` -> `RentmanProject`
- `subProjects` -> `/subprojects` -> `RentmanSubProject`
- `projectEquipment` -> `/projectequipment` -> `RentmanProjectEquipment`
- `projectEquipmentGroups` -> `/projectequipmentgroups` -> `RentmanProjectEquipmentGroup`
- `projectFunctions` -> `/projectfunctions` -> `RentmanProjectFunction`
- `projectFunctionGroups` -> `/projectfunctiongroups` -> `RentmanProjectFunctionGroup`
- `projectCrew` -> `/projectcrew` -> `RentmanProjectCrew`
- `projectVehicles` -> `/projectvehicles` -> `RentmanProjectVehicle`
- `projectRequests` -> `/projectrequests` -> `RentmanProjectRequest`
- `projectTypes` -> `/projecttypes` -> `RentmanProjectType`
- `planning` -> `/planning` -> `RentmanPlanning`
- `invoices` -> `/invoices` -> `RentmanInvoice`
- `invoiceLines` -> `/invoicelines` -> `RentmanInvoiceLine`
- `invoiceMoments` -> `/invoicemoments` -> `RentmanInvoiceMoment`
- `quotes` -> `/quotes` -> `RentmanQuote`
- `payments` -> `/payments` -> `RentmanPayment`
- `costs` -> `/costs` -> `RentmanCost`
- `taxClasses` -> `/taxclasses` -> `RentmanTaxClass`
- `ledgerCodes` -> `/ledgercodes` -> `RentmanLedgerCode`
- `rates` -> `/rates` -> `RentmanRate`
- `factors` -> `/factors` -> `RentmanFactor`
- `factorGroups` -> `/factorgroups` -> `RentmanFactorGroup`
- `subrentals` -> `/subrentals` -> `RentmanSubrental`
- `subrentalEquipment` -> `/subrentalequipment` -> `RentmanSubrentalEquipment`
- `subrentalEquipmentGroups` -> `/subrentalequipmentgroups` -> `RentmanSubrentalEquipmentGroup`
- `appointments` -> `/appointments` -> `RentmanAppointment`
- `appointmentCrew` -> `/appointmentcrew` -> `RentmanAppointmentCrew`
- `vehicles` -> `/vehicles` -> `RentmanVehicle`
- `timeRegistrations` -> `/timeregistrations` -> `RentmanTimeRegistration`
- `timeRegistrationActivities` -> `/timeregistrationactivities` -> `RentmanTimeRegistrationActivity`
- `leaveMutations` -> `/leavemutations` -> `RentmanLeaveMutation`
- `leaveRequests` -> `/leaverequests` -> `RentmanLeaveRequest`
- `leaveTypes` -> `/leavetypes` -> `RentmanLeaveType`
- `activities` -> `/activities` -> `RentmanCrewActivity`
- `files` -> `/files` -> `RentmanFile`
- `fileFolders` -> `/filefolders` -> `RentmanFileFolder`
- `folders` -> `/folders` -> `RentmanFolder`
- `functions` -> `/functions` -> `RentmanFunction`
- `functionGroups` -> `/functiongroups` -> `RentmanFunctionGroup`
- `statuses` -> `/statuses` -> `RentmanStatus`
- `contracts` -> `/contracts` -> `RentmanContract`
- `taglinks` -> `/taglinks` -> `RentmanTaglink`
- `briefpapier` -> `/briefpapier` -> `RentmanBriefpapier`
- `numberSeries` -> `/numberseries` -> `RentmanNumberSeries`
- `templates` -> `/templates` -> `RentmanTemplate`

For fuller signatures, examples, and caveats, see `llms-full.txt` and `README.md`.
